bug_bounty_scope.program_name: Chainlink Payment Abstraction V2 — Code4rena Audit

entry_points: WorkflowRouter.onReport() — automation ingress for triggering auctions
in_scope.notes: 1,060 nSLOC total. Dutch auction mechanism converting fee tokens to LINK. Integrates with CowSwap (GPv2) for solver participation.
in_scope.scope_restriction: Only files listed in scope.txt are eligible for awards

reasons.FeeAggregator: Explicitly out of scope per contest rules
reasons.V12_findings: All V12 Zellic AI findings are ineligible for awards
reasons.non_canonical_erc20: Fee-on-transfer, rebasing, non-approve-0 tokens are known limitations

automation_infrastructure.reason: Automation roles (forwarder) are considered trusted; automation triggering logic is out of scope

oracle_verification.reason: Cryptographic verification of Data Streams reports is delegated to external verifier contract (out of scope)

admin_roles.note: Admin configuration (allowlisting, receivers, parameters) is trusted

automation_forwarder.description: WorkflowRouter forwarder role that submits reports and triggers auctions
automation_forwarder.note: Automation infrastructure is trusted; roles assigned to it are privileged

bidders.note: Any address can bid; callback execution and reentrancy risks apply

price_feeds.description: Data Streams price feeds submitted via PriceManager.transmit()
price_feeds.note: Feed data is verified by external verifier (out of scope), but staleness and manipulation within PriceManager logic is in scope

Critical.impact: Direct theft or permanent freezing of funds
examples: Drain auction contract funds via bid manipulation
Bypass price curve to buy assets at near-zero cost

High.impact: Significant loss of funds or protocol value extraction
examples: Rounding errors enabling systematic value extraction
Reentrancy via callback leading to double-spend
Price manipulation enabling unfair auction outcomes

Medium.impact: Conditional loss of funds, DoS of core functionality, or broken invariants
examples: Slippage threshold bypass under specific conditions
Stale price data enabling unfavorable trades

Low.impact: Minor issues, informational, or gas optimizations

publicly_known_issues: Non-canonical ERC20s (fee-on-transfer, rebasing, non-approve-0) are not supported
Arbitrary deposits during live auctions: balance-based amount detection means extra deposits are only available to bid() callers, not CowSwap solvers. Accepted as net positive.
CowSwap order staleness: limit orders may have higher price than on-chain auction value due to periodic updates. Failed solver orders possible when non-CowSwap bidder reduces balance.
